name: mcp-server-checkpoint-avanan
display_name: Checkpoint Harmony Email & Collaboration (Avanan) MCP Server
description: MCP server for Checkpoint Harmony Email & Collaboration (Avanan) - email security, anti-phishing, anti-malware, and threat detection
long_description: Provides AI assistants with structured access to Checkpoint Harmony Email & Collaboration (formerly Avanan). Manage email quarantine, investigate threats and IOCs, view security events and alerts, manage policies (DLP, anti-phishing, anti-malware), manage users, generate reports, investigate incidents, configure Smart Banners, and monitor SaaS application protection through the Model Context Protocol.

checkpoint_client_id.title: Checkpoint Client ID
checkpoint_client_id.description: Your Checkpoint Harmony API client ID

checkpoint_client_secret.title: Checkpoint Client Secret
checkpoint_client_secret.description: Your Checkpoint Harmony API client secret (access key)

checkpoint_region.title: Region Override (optional)
checkpoint_region.description: Force a specific region: us, eu, au, or in. Leave blank to auto-detect (recommended).
